notes: gpt-5.5 and gpt-5.4 have two context-length pricing tiers: short context and long context. The threshold between short and long context is not explicitly documented on the pricing pages as of 2026-06-12. The values here use the short-context rates. gpt-5.5 short context: $5.00 input / $0.50 cached / $30.00 output per 1M. gpt-5.5 long context: $10.00 input / $1.00 cached / $45.00 output per 1M. gpt-5.4 short context: $2.50 input / $0.25 cached / $15.00 output per 1M. gpt-5.4 long context: $5.00 input / $0.50 cached / $22.50 output per 1M. cache_write_per_m=0 because OpenAI prompt caching is automatic (no explicit write cost charged).
